commit.message:
Add per-language tab colours and slightly brighten them

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add favicon/tab icons, JS consent cookie, and custom checkbox styling

- Replace SVG favicon with PNG; show it left of the editor tabs
- Add per-language SVG icons to HTML/CSS/JS tabs
- Add 24-hour cookie consent option to JS consent dialog; skip dialog on return visits
- Replace native checkbox with custom-styled indigo checkbox

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Update favicon to be larger.
Updated favicon.
Deploy how-to-make-ice-cream to GitHub Pages

Widen dialog to 380px

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Show share URL as wrapped text instead of scrollable input

Replace the fixed-width input in the share dialog with a plain text
block that word-wraps the full URL across multiple lines, so it is
fully visible without scrolling. Stack the copy button below the URL.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix share link caching - preserve shareUrl across dialog close

- Don't clear shareUrl when closing the share dialog so the cached link persists
- On error, clear shareUrl and cached snapshot so the next attempt can retry

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace URL fragment sharing with Cloudflare KV worker

- Remove lz-string dependency and hash-based encode/decode logic
- On load, read pathname and fetch code from kvs.cyberbilby.com if a share code is present
- Share button POSTs {html,css,js} to kvs.cyberbilby.com and displays the generated URL
- ShareDialog now handles loading and error states during share link generation
- No longer updates the URL on every keystroke

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Changed default javascript to use logger instead of browser alert.

Console panel CSS, full HTML boilerplate, log type abbreviations

- Add all console panel styles (header, entries, badges, collapse)
- Abbreviate log types to fixed 3-letter codes: LOG, INF, WRN, ERR
- Add square brackets around log type label
- Always show console title when collapsed; rotate vertically in column layout
- User now supplies full HTML boilerplate; CSS/JS injected into head/body
- Update default HTML to full DOCTYPE document

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove docs folder and deploy script, add docs to .gitignore

Switching to Cloudflare for deployments.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Deploy: update docs build
Deploy: update docs build
Deploy: update docs build

Add content validator (npm run validate)

- Add src/validate-content.js: validates all content/ JSON files for
  correct structure, required keys, no unknown keys, UUID format,
  block schemas, and cross-reference integrity
- Add 'validate' script to package.json
- Update creating-sites.instructions.md to require running the
  validator after authoring
- Update AUTHORING.md checklist to mention the validator; mark
  page 'order' field as optional
- Update copilot-instructions.md to list the validate command

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Improve ai instructions.
Removed sample site.
Updated ai instructions to follow copilot format/structure.

docs: clarify single-page site requirements in CLAUDE.md

- Clarify that sections can be [] for single-page sites
- Add explicit callout linking disableNav, floatingDarkMode, and empty
  sections as required together for single-page sites

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: add single-page site authoring guidance

- Add dedicated 'Single-page sites' section between Step 4 and Step 5
- Covers disableNav, floatingDarkMode, empty sections/pages, showPageGrid: false
- Includes comparison table, annotated site.json template, worked example
- Add single-page checklist block to the pre-save checklist

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: document disableNav and floatingDarkMode site settings

Add disableNav and floatingDarkMode fields to the site.json schema
in both CLAUDE.md and .ai/AUTHORING.md. Note that both options are
particularly useful for single-page sites.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add disable nav and floating dark mode button settings

- Add 'Disable navigation sidebar' toggle in site settings; hides the
  sidebar and top bar, useful for single-page home-only sites
- Add 'Show floating dark mode button' toggle; renders a fixed pill
  button in the top-right corner of exported pages
- Update DARK_MODE_JS to use querySelectorAll so it wires up any
  number of .dark-mode-btn elements (sidebar + floating)
- Add floatingDarkMode and disableNav to sanitiseSettings allowlist
  in validate.js so the values are persisted to site.json

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add iframe block type; add HTML & CSS basics site; update CLAUDE.md

- Add new 'iframe' block type supporting URL and HTML (srcdoc) modes
  - src/blockTypes.js: register type, defaultBlock
  - src/components/BlockEditor.jsx: IframeEditor component with mode dropdown
  - src/generator/index.js: renderBlock case + .iframe-block CSS
- Add 'HTML & CSS Basics for Beginners' learning site (4 pages)
  - Getting Started, HTML Basics, CSS Basics, Your First Multi-Page Website
  - Live iframe previews on HTML Basics, CSS Basics, and multi-page pages
- CLAUDE.md: add iframe to block types list; expand to full
  'Creating a new CMS block' section with file table, conventions, checklist

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add tip block, beginner recipes site, and block authoring docs

- Add new tip block type (amber-themed, distinct from callout) across all
  required layers: blockTypes.js, BlockEditor.jsx, Preview.jsx, generator
- Create beginner-recipes site with Pasta Aglio e Olio and Scrambled Eggs
  pages using recipe-detail, steps, tip, and callout blocks correctly
- Add .ai/CREATE-BLOCK.md — full step-by-step guide for adding new blocks
- Improve .ai/BLOCKS.md with tip, recipe-detail, and steps documentation
- Update CLAUDE.md with no-emoji rule, tip block entry, and CREATE-BLOCK link
- Remove emoji and tidy home page / header / footer in recipes site.json

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add steps and recipe-detail block types; refactor from ingredient-list/recipe-steps

- Added 'steps' block (generic numbered steps, Structure group)
- Added 'recipe-detail' block (name, description, image, ingredients list)
- Removed old 'ingredient-list' and 'recipe-steps' block types
- Migrated existing demo page to new block types
- Updated BlockEditor.jsx, blockTypes.js, generator/index.js
- Updated .ai/BLOCKS.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md documentation
- Added note to CLAUDE.md: do not run generate after creating a site

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Tell AI not to try and generate sites when done generating.
Fix old fallback theme colors and update ai instructions around theming.

Deploy beginner-javascript to GitHub Pages
Updated AI instructions with more detail around blocks and parameters.
Deploy beginner-javascript to GitHub Pages
Undeploy fetch-js from GitHub Pages
Undeploy js-fundamentals from GitHub Pages
Deploy js-fundamentals to GitHub Pages
Update AI site authoring instructions and deleted sample site.
Deploy learn-js to GitHub Pages

Add AI site authoring documentation

- Add CLAUDE.md with CMS overview and 'Creating a new site' instructions
- Add .ai/AUTHORING.md with full step-by-step site authoring guide
- Add .ai/BLOCKS.md with complete block type reference and examples

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Deploy fetch-js to GitHub Pages
Updated deployment to also stage site content.
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages

Code quality fixes, loading UX improvements, and page transition fade

- Remove dead code: uuid.js wrapper, storage.js (merged into paths.js),
  NGINX_WEB_ROOT, Express middleware stubs, _origHeading, console.warn
- Fix bugs: selectedSite.deployed -> deployedGithubPages, initialSlug ->
  pageSlug prop, PageEditor useEffect missing deps
- Architecture: create shared cms-settings.js lib; add resolveSite/validateSlug
  helpers to validate.js; convert pages.js to CJS; standardise {ok} -> {success};
  add console.error to all API catch blocks; merge storage.js into paths.js
- Generator: add hexToRgb validation; extract annotateAndRender() helper;
  add XSS design intent comments for header/footer injection
- Frontend: standardise cdialog-* -> modal-* CSS class names; extract
  TOAST_DURATION_MS and FOCUS_DELAY_MS constants; rename dragOverTarget ->
  dragOverSectionId; group BlockEditor props via spread; simplify HomeEditor
  by removing redundant latestHomeRef; remove unused drag props from HomeEditor
- Add explanatory comments to all eslint-disable-next-line hooks directives
- Page editor: remove full-screen loading state; show inline spinners in
  blocks area and preview pane while page data loads
- Page transition: smooth 0.3s opacity fade on editor mount; suppress
  double-animation from nested split-pane

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix all 20 issues from PROBLEMS.md

- next.config.mjs: add real bodySizeLimit 8mb and trailingSlash: true
- generator: wrap previewAssetPaths reset in try/finally
- App.jsx: fix handleDeleteSite (try/catch + direct await undeploy)
- App.jsx: reset pagesLoading in openSite on site switch
- App.jsx: console.warn on loadSettings failure instead of silent swallow
- themes/[id]/route.js: filter DEFAULT_THEME before write to disk
- themes/[id]/route.js: fix theme name whitespace length limit bypass
- sites/[siteId]/route.js: DELETE also removes docs/<slug>/
- sites/[siteId]/route.js: settings title rename failure returns HTTP 207
- SiteSelector.jsx: only show undeploy checkbox when site is deployed
- pages/[id]/duplicate/route.js: add reserved slug check
- SitePreview.jsx: show error state regardless of everGenerated flag
- Extract safePagePath/slugExists to src/lib/pages.js; update 4 routes
- api.js + PageEditor.jsx: remove dead updatePage, use patchPage
- pages/reorder/route.js: return 400 on missing page IDs
- site-preview/route.js: case-insensitive regex for base tag injection
- .env.example: document LCMS_DATA_DIR env var
- INSTALL.md: remove nginx sections and nonexistent start-api-dev.sh

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Added PROBLEMS file containing improvements for later.

Update README for Next.js migration

- Single npm install / npm run dev instead of two separate processes
- Remove Nginx deployment section (no longer supported)
- Remove old shell scripts from getting started
- Update project structure to reflect src/ layout
- Consolidate dependencies into a single table (no more client/server split)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add CLAUDE.md context file for AI assistants

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix undeploy: add git commit and push when removing from GitHub Pages

Previously the DELETE /api/sites/[siteId]/deploy/github-pages route
only removed docs/<slug>/ from the filesystem without committing the
change. This meant the deletion was invisible to git and GitHub Pages
still served the old site.

Now mirrors the deploy flow: git add docs/, git commit, git push.
Also marks deployedGithubPages: false in sites.json after a successful
undeploy.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Deleted test-site.

Add loading spinners to site selector and pages sidebar

- SiteSelector: show a spinner while sites are being fetched from the
  API; suppress the 'No sites yet' empty state until loading completes
- Pages sidebar: show a spinner while pages are loading after opening
  a site; hide sections and page lists until fetch completes
- Add sitesLoading and pagesLoading states in App.jsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Deploy test-site to GitHub Pages

commit.message: Update deployment script to cleanup dist.
Deploy: update docs build
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages

Add hint block type for hidden, click-to-reveal activity hints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy mohammed-website to GitHub Pages

Update content data files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CMS-wide theme editor: shared themes, create/delete, case study export improvements

- Theme editor now loads/saves themes from CMS-wide store (cms-settings.json)
  via new /api/cms-settings/themes CRUD routes
- Themes are shared across all sites (with optional per-site private flag)
- Default theme is built-in (not stored on disk), always present, read-only —
  controls are greyed out with a notice linking to create a new theme
- Replaced hardcoded presets with a selectable theme list; add delete buttons
  for user-created themes (with confirmation dialog)
- Fix color picker closing mid-drag: moved ColorPickerRow outside ThemeView so
  it has a stable component identity across re-renders
- Case study export: add "Case Study" eyebrow label, gradient header, prose
  styles on section bodies, stacked layout instead of 2-column grid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages
Added some sample assets for demo site.

Improve image block: media picker dialog, size/align overrides

- Media picker now renders via portal to escape DOM containment issues
- Picker requires selecting an image then confirming with a button
- Image block overrides section: width, height (checkbox + number + unit),
  and alignment (left/center/right) applied as float or margin:auto on the img

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Separate site name and slug into independent fields

- Sites now have an independently editable name and slug
- Slug uniqueness enforced on create and update
- New/rename dialogs show both fields; slug auto-populates from name on create
- Migration: sites with empty names default to Untitled on server startup
- Add spacing between form fields in site dialog

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Various CMS nav and editor UI tweaks

- Delete section via custom dialog with optional page deletion checkbox
- Remove border-bottom and add margin to home-page-item
- Increase sidebar search top padding to 8px
- Show empty state hint in block list when no blocks exist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove fallback icon from nav when page has no icon set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign GitHub Pages deployment dialogs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move deployed badge below description in deploy picker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages

Replace start/stop scripts with separate dev and prod scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update site content data

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix fill-in-the-blank code mode inputs being stripped by hljs

hljs.highlightAll() re-processes every <pre><code> on the page,
replacing innerHTML and destroying the <input> elements inside the
fitb code block. Adding data-highlighted="yes" to the <code>
element tells hljs it has already been processed and to skip it.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Shrink deployed URL link to text width to avoid accidental clicks

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Redesign site selector as a dashboard

- Rename header from 'Your Sites' to 'Dashboard'
- Add stats bar showing total sites, live count, and not-deployed count
- Add deployment status badge (Live / Not deployed) on every site row
- Show live URL below site name/slug when baseUrl is configured and site
  is deployed (clickable, opens in new tab)
- Restructure site-project-info to column layout to accommodate URL row

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Surface git push failures as errors during GitHub Pages deploy

- git add/push are now fatal; a failed push returns 500 so the UI
  shows an error toast instead of a false success
- git commit remains non-fatal; 'nothing to commit' is silently
  ignored, other commit errors surface as a warning toast
- Added warning toast style (amber) to App.css
- Client checks result.gitWarning and displays it as a warning toast

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Prevent duplicate site names on create and rename

- POST /api/sites returns 409 if a site with the same name already
  exists (case-insensitive comparison)
- PATCH /api/sites/:siteId returns 409 if the new name conflicts with
  another site (excludes the site being renamed)
- Client handleCreateSite and handleRenameSite now catch errors and
  surface them as toast notifications
- Add 4 new tests covering duplicate create, case-insensitive
  duplicate, rename conflict, and same-name rename (no-op allowed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix site rename ghost deployments; remove nginx support

- Fix: PATCH /api/sites/:siteId now renames output/ and docs/
  directories when the slug changes, so deployments follow the site
  rather than being orphaned as unmanageable ghosts
- Remove all nginx deployment support (routes, client UI, API
  functions, tests) — GitHub Pages is the only deploy target
- Remove GET /api/nginx/status endpoint and nginx.js route
- Remove deployedNginx field from site listings
- Update SiteSelector undeploy label to reference GitHub Pages only
- 3 test suites removed (nginx status, nginx deploy, nginx undeploy)
  leaving 34 passing tests

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Smooth live preview refresh indicator and UX improvements

- Remove key={refreshSignal} from preview iframe so the same element
  stays in the DOM; old content remains visible while new HTML loads,
  eliminating the flash on every auto-save cycle
- Toast and toolbar dot are always rendered; visibility is controlled
  via CSS opacity transitions for a smooth fade in/out
- Toolbar label transitions to 'Refreshing...' (accent colour) while
  an update is in flight, then fades back to 'Preview'
- Update toast text from 'Updating...' to 'Refreshing preview...'
- Toolbar dot fades in/out smoothly instead of popping in/out

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add hierarchical heading numbering and anchor copy links

- Heading blocks are numbered sequentially (1., 1.1., 2.3.1. etc.)
  based on their order and nesting level on the page
- Numbers appear in the exported page content and sidebar TOC nav
- Numbers are shown in the live CMS preview
- Anchor IDs remain slug-only (numbers are not part of the fragment)
- A '#' copy-link button appears on heading hover in the exported site;
  clicking it copies the full URL with anchor to the clipboard
- Remove markdown headings from TOC nav — only heading blocks are
  indexed and shown in navigation
- Fix anchor scroll offset: add scroll-padding-top: 64px so sticky
  top bar no longer obscures jump targets

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Remove unused site and improved fetching documentation.
Create CNAME
